title: senecio myriophyllus
intro: Senecio myriophyllus, also known as Myrio or Jacobaea, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat liver and gallbladder issues, as well as to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Senecio myriophyllus include its ability to protect the liver from damage, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as indigestion and bloating. Senecio myriophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
